Part.Source:
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = UPPER(&Title) print Cabecalho PRINT MENU End //############################################# FIM HEADER DEFAULT ############################
&PercentualTotal = 0
//######################################################### CONTAGEM PROGRESS ######################## If &IsIgnoredPrevious = False For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreDtaVct Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = &CreRecPag Where CreDtaVct < &IniCreDtaVct Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD &PercentualTotal +=1 EndFor EndIf
For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreDtaVct Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = &CreRecPag Where CreDtaVct >= &IniCreDtaVct and CreDtaVct <= &FinCreDtaVct Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA &PercentualTotal +=1 EndFor
&Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() &PerCount = 0 do 'Atualiza'
//############################################################# INICIO ###########################
&AntCreTotGer = 0 // Total Gerado em duplicatas antes da Data Inicial DATABASE CreDtaEms &AntCreVlrDup = 0 // Total Vencido em duplicatas antes da data inicial DATABASE CreDtaVct &AntCrevlrSdo = 0 // Saldo Vencida em Duplicata antes da data inicial DATABASE CreDtaVct &AntCrePagTotItm = 0 // Total Recebido &AntCrePagVlrJur = 0 &AntCrePagVlrDsc = 0 &UltCreVlrDup = 0 &UltCrevlrSdo = 0 &UltCrePagTotItm = 0 &UltCrePagVlrJur = 0 &UltCrePagVlrDsc = 0 &AtzCrePagTotItm = 0 &AtzCrePagVlrDsc = 0 &X = 0
If &IsIgnoredPrevious = False For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreDtaVct Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = &CreRecPag Where CreDtaVct < &IniCreDtaVct Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA &AntCreVlrDup += CreVlrDup &AntCrevlrSdo += CreVlrSdo For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CrePagDta,CrePagCod Where CrePagSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or CrePagSts.IsEmpty() or CrePagSts.IsNull() If CrePagDta < &IniCreDtaVct ///dentro do prazo &AntCrePagTotItm += CrePagTotItm &AntCrePagVlrJur += CrePagVlrJur &AntCrePagVlrDsc += CrePagVlrDsc Else //pago em atrazo &AtzCrePagTotItm += CrePagTotItm &AntCrePagVlrJur += CrePagVlrJur &AntCrePagVlrDsc += CrePagVlrDsc EndIf EndFor &X +=1 If &X = 250 &PerCount += 249 &X=0 Do 'Percentual' EndIf EndFor &PerCount += &X Do 'Percentual' &AntCreVlrSdoMes = &AntCreVlrDup - &AntCrePagTotItm &InaPerMes = (((&AntCreVlrSdoMes) * 100) / &AntCreVlrDup) &AntCreRcbGer = &AtzCrePagTotItm+&AntCrePagTotItm &AntCreTotGer = DuplicatasGeradas.udp(&EmpCod,&CreRecPag,year(&IniCreDtaVct),month(&IniCreDtaVct),day(&IniCreDtaVct),'A') &Percent = (100 -(((&AntCrePagTotItm) * 100) / &AntCreVlrDup)) &year = year(&IniCreDtaVct) &month = month(&IniCreDtaVct) &Count = 0
&VlrVctBrtAnt = &AntCreVlrDup &VlrSdoBrtAnt = &AntCreVlrSdo // saldo geral
Print dados Else &VlrVctBrt = 0 &VlrSdoBrtAnt = 0 &AntCreRcbGer = 0 &AntCrevlrSdo = 0 EndIf
For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreDtaVct Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = &CreRecPag Where CreDtaVct >= &IniCreDtaVct and CreDtaVct <= &FinCreDtaVct Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC Where CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA
If &mes <> month(CreDtaVct) AND &Count = 1
&DupCreGer = DuplicatasGeradas.udp(EmpCod,CreRecPag,&Ano,&mes,0,'M') GetVencimentonoMes.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,CreRecPag,&Ano,&mes,&InaTotRcbMes,&InaTotDesMes,&InaTotJurmes) &InaTotVct = &CreVlrDup &InaTotSdo = &CrevlrSdo &InaTotRcb = &CrePagTotItm &InaTotDes = &CrePagVlrDsc &InaTotJur = &CrePagVlrJur &InaTotSdoMes = &InaTotVct - &InaTotRcbMes &InaPerMes = (((&InaTotSdoMes) * 100) / &InaTotVct) //percentual mensal
//vencido geral = total vencido mês + saldo mês anterior &TotInaTotVctLiq = &InaTotVct + &AntCrevlrSdo //Total Geral &AntCrevlrSdo = &TotInaTotSdo //Totaliza
//Recebido geral = &InaTotRcb
//Saldo Geral = Saldo do mês + saldo mês anterior &TotInaTotSdo = &InaTotSdo + &VlrSdoBrtAnt // Total em saldo Bruto &VlrSdoBrtAnt = &TotInaTotSdo // Totaliza
//########################################## calculo percentual geral##################### &TotInaTotVct = &InaTotVct+&VlrVctBrtAnt //Total Vencido Bruto &VlrVctBrtAnt = &TotInaTotVct //totaliza
&TotInaTotRcb = &InaTotRcb+&AntCreRcbGer // Total recebido Bruto &AntCreRcbGer = &TotInaTotRcb //Totaliza &Percent = (100 -((&TotInaTotRcb * 100) / &TotInaTotVct))
//######################################################################################### Print dados3 &DupCreGer = 0 &InaTotVct = 0 &InaTotSdo = 0 &InaTotRcb = 0 &InaTotDes = 0 &InaTotJur = 0 &InaPerMes = 0 &CreVlrDup = 0 &CrevlrSdo = 0 &InaTotSdoMes = 0 &CrePagVlrDsc = 0 &CrePagVlrJur = 0 &CrePagTotItm = 0 EndIf &mes = month(CreDtaVct) &Count = 1
If &Ano <> Year(CreDtaVct) &DupAno = Year(CreDtaVct) Print dados2 noskip EndIf &Ano = Year(CreDtaVct)
&CreVlrDup += CreVlrDup &CrevlrSdo += CreVlrSdo
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CrePagDta,CrePagCod Where CrePagSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or CrePagSts.IsEmpty() or CrePagSts.IsNull() Where CrePagDta >= &IniCreDtaVct and CrePagDta <= &FinCreDtaVct &CrePagTotItm += CrePagTotItm &CrePagVlrJur += CrePagVlrJur &CrePagVlrDsc += CrePagVlrDsc EndFor &X +=1 If &X = 250 &PerCount += 249 &X=0 Do 'Percentual' EndIf EndFor
&PerCount += &X Do 'Percentual'
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
sub 'Percentual' &PerCount += 1 If &PerCount > 0 &Percentual = round((&PerCount / &PercentualTotal) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza' EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
